title: Xanthous Energizing Ethiopian Salt Cod Doro Wot
description: A malty and energizing Ethiopian dish featuring salt cod, ssam-wrap, and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients, served in a traditional doro wot style.
instructions: Heat the ayurvedic ghee in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the soaked and drained salt cod and cook until it is flaked and heated through.
Stir in the malt syrup and lemon juice.
Warm the ssam wrap pieces by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the doro wot by placing a piece of salt cod on each ssam wrap and topping with a spoonful of the onion and spice mixture.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
